rows.label: qev014303_MSG0001
rows.name: Ahaha! Ahahahahahahahaha!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0002
rows.name:
Pukuku...
I fooouuund yooou![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ahahaha!
I knew you'd come! I knew you'd come!
I knew you'd definitely come to kill Alex-chan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0004
rows.name:
In the end, humans are creatures who can only live
in a kill-or-be-killed world, aren't they~
Ahahahahahahahaha! It's so funny![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0005
rows.name:
Don't be so stiff,
come plaaay with uuus![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0006
rows.name:
Alex-chaaan!
I win the bet, riiight?
Can I use another Alien as a toy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0007
rows.name:
Stop raising that extremely unpleasant laughter.
Do whatever you want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0008
rows.name: ...However, I will have your cooperation now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0009
rows.name: Ahahaha! Rooogerrr![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now then, if I kill you,
who will come to kill us next?
Aha! I'm looking forward to it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ahahaha! We looost!
Sooo baaad![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0012
rows.name: Cough... Whoa, blood~ How straaange![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0013
rows.name:
Huh... I can't stand up?
Pukuku... fufufu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ahaha!
My right hand came off, it came off~! It hurts, it hurts~!
Ahahahahaha!!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0015
rows.name: To think you'd sniff out this location...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_JNK0010
rows.name: Report

rows.label: qev014303_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell him you obtained the information
from a Nopon informant.

rows.label: qev014303_JNK0020
rows.name: Reprove

rows.label: qev014303_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell him this is his own fault,
karmic retribution.

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0016
rows.name:
I see...
They really are a detestable bunch...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hmph... I was planning to use these Growth folks
as disposable pawns anyway, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0018
rows.name:
Because of you and Eliza,
things just won't go well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0019
rows.name:
Everything is due to my own actions... huh.
It makes me want to laugh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0020
rows.name:
As expected, you are
nothing but a pawn to that ignorant woman...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0021
rows.name:
Don't forget.
Never assume that the opinion of the victor
is absolute...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0022
rows.name:
You have quite a bit of leeway
for someone whose path to the underworld is opening up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0023
rows.name:
Didn't it ever cross your mind that comrades might be hiding
and preparing a surprise attack... you gullible fool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0024
rows.name:
No... I suppose there is neither heaven nor hell
for fabricated existences like us...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0025
rows.name:
Was this...
the kind of ending I wished to meet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0026
rows.name:
Eliza...
Initially... I thought...
we understood each other...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0027
rows.name: Heh... Hahaha!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0028
rows.name:
Do not think... the ideal you speak of
will be achieved so easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0029
rows.name:
Fuffuffu...
Ahhahhaha!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014303_MSG0030
rows.name: Ahaha! Ha... Hahi![ST:wait ]
